title: Catalog recovery paths and common-mode risk
goal: Add reviewed primary/recovery path references and independence classification for foundational and essential functions.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: Critical functions reference primary and recovery modes without embedding live readiness.
Recovery independence is classified as independent, partially shared, same failure domain or unknown with sources.
Single-path risks can be explicitly accepted instead of receiving fictional redundancy.
Weltgewebe data, Grabowski runtime, production release and RepoGround cutover are represented.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
